expectedFirstIngredient: 75 fresh meat and wild caught fish
ingredientsText: 75% Fresh Meat and Wild Caught Fish (45% chicken, 15% Sardines, 15% Anchovies), 20% sweet potato, 3% health mix (banana (4487 mg/kg), artichoke (4188 mg/kg), chicory, alfalfa (2991 mg/kg), apples (2692 mg/kg), broccoli (2542 mg/kg), blueberries (2393 mg/kg) sprouts (2094 mg/kg), green-lipped mussel (1496 mg/kg), rosemary (1196 mg/kg), thyme (897 mg/kg), oregano (598 mg/kg), milk thistle, spirulina, olive oil, yucca), 1% trout oil, glucosamine (1000 mg/kg), chondroitin (850 mg/kg), msm (650 mg/kg), L-Carnitine (500 mg/kg), taurine (1000 mg/kg). Vitamin A (14400 IU), Vitamin D3 (1800 IU), Vitamin E 100 mg, B-complex: Vitamin B2 (2.2 mg), Vitamin B5 (7.2 mg) and Vitamin B12 (15 µg), Folic acid 0.9 mg, Trace elements: Zinc 185 mg, Iron 48 mg, Copper 7.5 mg, Iodine 0.95 mg, Selenium 0.14 mg.
